v2.subtitle: Advanced pass search uses the same query language as levels. Use field tokens, operators, and ranges to narrow results quickly.

basics.title: Basics (how queries are parsed)
basics.intro: Write conditions as field:value or field=value. Use commas for AND inside a group, and | to create OR groups.

playerAndMedia.title: Player & video fields
playerAndMedia.intro: These fields match pass player names and video metadata. Use : for partial match, = for exact match.

examples.videoAndTitle: video:youtube.com matches video links; vidtitle:clear matches video titles.
examples.mixFields:
player:Name, vidtitle:run
Combine player and video fields in one group.

levelContext.title: Level fields (on the pass)
levelContext.intro: Filter passes by properties of the linked level. Field names use dot notation.

examples.songArtist: level.song:hello, level.artist:cam filters by level song and artist.
examples.dlLink: level.dlLink:drive.google matches the level download link text.

numeric.title: Key count (ranges)
numeric.intro: Filter by key count with exact values or comparisons. Use >, <, >=, <= for ranges.

examples.exact: keycount:12 or keycount=12 for an exact key count.
examples.range: keycount:>8, keycount:<12 filters key count between 8 and 12.
examples.combine:
player:Name, keycount:>=13
Combine with player or level filters.

idsAndShortcuts.title: IDs & shortcuts
idsAndShortcuts.intro: Jump to a specific pass or filter by numeric player id.

examples.hashtag: #123 opens pass id 123 directly (search bar shortcut).
examples.playerId: player.id=456 filters passes by exact player id.

tips.title: Tips
tips.intro: A few details that help avoid surprises.

bullets.caseInsensitive: Search is case-insensitive: 'PLAYER' and 'player' behave the same.
bullets.spacesAllowed: Spaces are allowed in values: player:Epic player works.
bullets.orderDoesNotMatter: Order does not matter within a group: player:foo, video:bar is the same as video:bar, player:foo.
bullets.groupingMentalModel: Think of it as (A AND B) OR (C AND D): commas build AND groups, | splits OR groups.
bullets.plainSearch: Without a field prefix, plain text searches player names, level song/artist, video links, and more.

operatorColon.title: Partial match
operatorColon.desc: Use : to match partial text (example: player:yo).

operatorComma.title: AND inside a group
operatorComma.desc: Separate terms with commas to require all conditions in the group.

operatorPipe.title: OR between groups
operatorPipe.desc: Use | to split your query into OR groups. If any group matches, the pass is included.

operatorNot.title: NOT (exclude)
operatorNot.desc: Prefix a term with \! to exclude matches containing that term.

player.title: Player name
player.desc: Filter by player display name or username.

playerId.title: Player id
playerId.desc: Filter by numeric player id (exact match).

vidtitle.title: Video title
vidtitle.desc: Filter by the pass video title.

levelSong.title: Level song
levelSong.desc: Filter by the linked level song name.

levelArtist.title: Level artist
levelArtist.desc: Filter by the linked level artist name.

levelDlLink.title: Level download link
levelDlLink.desc: Filter by the linked level download link text.

keycount.title: Key count
keycount.desc: Filter by number of keys. Supports exact values and ranges.

hashtag.title: Pass id (shortcut)
hashtag.desc: Typing #123 in the search bar loads pass id 123 directly.

search.title: Field-Specific Search
search.description: You can search for specific fields using two different operators: colon (:) for partial matches and equals (=) for exact matches.

examples.title: Field Examples
examples.playerField: Use 'player:Name' for partial match or 'player=Name' for exact match
examples.videoField: Use 'video:Link' for partial match or 'video=Link' for exact match

operators.title: Search Operators
operators.description: You can combine multiple search conditions using operators.

examples.title: Operator Examples
examples.and: Search for passes that match both conditions (AND)
examples.or: Search for passes that match either condition (OR)
examples.complex: Complex search combining AND and OR conditions

numeric.title: Key Count Filtering
numeric.description: Filter passes by key count using keycount:. Prefix with >, <, >=, or <= for ranges. Separate multiple conditions with commas (AND) within the same search group.

examples.title: Key Count Examples
examples.exact: Exact key count (also works with keycount=12)
examples.range: Key count strictly between 8 and 12 (use >= or <= for inclusive bounds)
examples.combine: Combine with player/song filters, e.g. player:Name, keycount:>=13

fields.keycount: Number of keys used for the pass

points.caseSensitive: Searches are case-insensitive - 'PLAYER' and 'player' will give the same results
points.partial: Colon (:) allows partial matches - 'player:yo' will match 'yoonsu' and 'yoon'
points.exact: Equals (=) requires exact matches - 'player=yoon' will only match 'yoon'
points.spaces: Spaces are allowed in search terms - 'player:Epic player' works
points.order: The order of conditions doesn't matter within each group
